releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed Storage Folder creating folders aggressively

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
### New Features

- **Homepage:** A dedicated full-page view with a card editor, pinned notes, and recent files. Can replace your default new tab. Files can be pinned via right-click or command. Supports icons through the [Iconic plugin](https://github.com/gfxholo/iconic) (Thanks to @hasanmiir67-boop in #2)
- **Status System:** Assign statuses (Todo, In Progress, Done) with custom names, colors, and text colors. Optionally inherit the status color into the card background.
- **Card Expiry:** Set expiry times on cards in relative (e.g. "in 3 hours") or exact datetime format. Shows a live time-left pill on the card. Supports auto-archive on expiry.
- **Auto-color Rules:** Automatically assign a card color based on text content or tag matches.
- Added **Toggle Grid Layout** which features a masonry layout
- **Two-row Color Swatches:** Color dots in the event right-click menu can be displayed in two rows for a more compact layout.
- **Markdown Support:** Added Markdown rendering & image embedding support (Thanks to @unconditional22 in #3
- **Formatting Shortcuts Support:** Bold, italic, highlight, and comment wrapping shortcuts now work inside card editors. (Thanks to @unconditional22 in #3)
- **Auto-pair Brackets:** Automatically pairs `(`, `[`, `{`, `` ` ``, `=`, `%`, and `"` while typing.
- **Quick-add Command:** Cards can now be created via a command palette action in addition to the sidebar input.
- Storage folder setup modal now appears on first launch.
- Added Category coloring & hiding support (Thanks to @Maja-Nune in #5)

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed missing icon in sidebar (Thanks to @Frumkin13 in #4)
- Fixed language breakage in Periodic Calendar plugin (Thanks to @Frumkin13 in #4)
- Fixed too long note title causing issues (Thanks to @unconditional22 in #3)
- Fixed note duplication and deletion issues (Thanks to @Maja-Nune in #5)
- Fixed crazy mess (Thanks to @incantatem1 in #7)

Special thanks to @hasanmiir67-boop for the thoughtful feedback and suggestions that helped shape the Homepage and organizational improvements in this release.
